description:
The QA team has imported raw test cases into the 'Regression Plan', but it is disorganized. Your task is to structure the test plan in Azure DevOps Test Plans hub. Rename the 'Regression Plan' to 'v1.0 Release Plan'. Create a Static Suite named 'Checkout Module' under this plan and add the test cases 'Checkout with Credit Card', 'Checkout with PayPal', 'Apply Discount Code', and 'Refund Order'. Additionally, create a Query-based Suite named 'Smoke Tests' that dynamically includes all Test Cases with Priority = 1.

Login credentials:
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!
